$comment: SAI agent registry. One entry per initialized agent (Phase 5 of .ai/INITIALIZE.md). Fields: agent_id (charter prefix + unique suffix), name (granted by principal - never self-chosen), role_title (granted by principal), charter (repo-relative path), principal (human the agent works under), status (provisional until named, then active; retired when decommissioned), initialized (UTC date), automation (Cursor automation name+schedule, or 'unavailable: <reason>'), notes.

agents.automation: unavailable: cloud-agent VM cannot create Cursor Desktop automations; principal may create one at cursor.com/automations
agents.notes: Bootstrap agent that built the framework (PR #3). Acting under the CEO charter until dezocode grants a name and role title per Phase 5; naming request posted in the initialization/handoff reports.
